info.title: TravelMate Ride-Sharing API
info.description: REST API for the TravelMate ride-sharing platform. Supports user authentication, ride management, bookings, wallet operations, escrow, KYC, bill payments, real-time chat, route feed, and more.

email.description: Email address (required if phone not provided)

phone.description: Phone number (required if email not provided)

firebaseIdToken.description: Firebase ID token from phone auth

tags.name: Wallet
tags.description: Wallet balance, funding, withdrawals, and transfers

tags.name: Bills
tags.description: Airtime, data, and electricity bill payments via VTPass

tags.name: Chats
tags.description: New chat system with multi-participant support

tags.name: Tracking
tags.description: Real-time GPS tracking for active bookings

tags.name: Route Feed
tags.description: Social route status updates and comments

tags.name: PDF
tags.description: PDF export of sitemaps and feature lists

tags.name: VTPass Admin
tags.description: Admin VTPass configuration and plan management

post.summary: Sign in with email/phone and password
Sign out and invalidate refresh token
Verify phone number with Firebase OTP

201.description: New user created and signed in

post.summary: Verify and enable 2FA with OTP code
Start or get existing conversation for a ride
Send a message in a conversation

200.description: Activity data (totalBookings, completedBookings, averageRating, totalRides, activeDriverRides)

get.summary: Get user activity feed (bookings, transactions, notifications)
Search rides by route, date, or geospatial coordinates
Get rides by a specific driver
Get all bookings for a ride

post.summary: Complete a ride (driver only, releases escrow)
Cancel a ride with optional reason

get.summary: Get pending bookings for the current driver
Get saved bank account for current user

post.summary: Hold funds in escrow for a booking
Raise a dispute on an escrow
Save a card for future payments

post.description: Verifies HMAC signature, processes escrow release, booking confirmation, wallet funding, and notifications.

post.summary: VTPass webhook for bill payment status
Termii SMS webhook for delivery reports

get.summary: Get unread message counts for a user

post.summary: Send a message in a chat

put.summary: Mark all messages as read in a chat
Mark all notifications as read for current user
Mark all notifications as read for a user
Mark a single notification as read

get.summary: Get location history for a booking
Get emergency contacts for a user

post.summary: Make an offer on a request

get.summary: Get all statuses for a specific route
Get a single status with comments

post.summary: Add a comment to a status
Add a comment to a status

get.summary: Get referral code, stats, and referred users

post.summary: Apply a referral code (get welcome bonus)

get.summary: Get driving route geometry between two points
List wallet transactions for a user (admin)

delete.summary: Delete a single saved plan by ID (admin)

get.summary: Get public app configuration (Mapbox token, etc.)
